name: Entry Management
description: Daily inspection logs with offline-first writes, DRAFT/SUBMITTED workflow (COMPLETE removed), review-then-submit flow, and photo/location/contractor attachments
constraints_summary: All entry writes succeed locally first (SQLite), queued for sync
Workflow states: DRAFT <-> SUBMITTED (bidirectional with undo, revision tracking)
No requiring network connection to create/edit entries
Location optional for drafts, required at submit review
Batch submit via SQLite transaction with single timestamp
